name: Sacred Circle

style_guide_alignment.safety: Dawn-blue translucent fill reads as warm safe zone
style_guide_alignment.boundary: Bright gold ring is the clear safety/danger edge
style_guide_alignment.expansion: Outer pulse ring visualizes bravery-driven territory growth
style_guide_alignment.sacred_geometry: Radial spokes + concentric rings + cardinal rune nodes

ue5_notes: Ground mesh provides the static geometry. Full VFX (particles, glow, pulsing animation) should use Niagara in UE5 layered on top of this mesh.
next_gate: UE5 import, Niagara overlay, dynamic radius scaling, Play-In-Editor territory test
